sessions.intent: Scan all PLang docs for inconsistencies; apply factual fixes Ingi approves.

before.assumptions: User-driven session, not pipeline. Scan three doc trees; report findings; fix the ones Ingi greenlights.
before.risk: Over-fixing — touching phrasing differences that PLang's intent-mapping tolerates by design. Mitigated by Ingi's reframing mid-session.

actions.context: Parallel Explore agents read all 61 doc files. Findings triaged into syntax/phrasing (rejected per Ingi's intent-based reframing) vs factual contradictions/staleness/broken refs (acted on).
Line 15: Providers -> Code (rename completed elsewhere months ago). Line 398: .pr binary -> JSON (confirmed by user; head-on contradiction with build_process.md).
Line 41: Providers registrations -> Code registrations. Same rename swept.

Five broken links repaired (goal-result.md, contexts.md, app.md, call-stack.md, modules.md none exist). Inline Data links retargeted to data-generic-design.md. Relationships block rewritten with prose references to existing docs.
Line 86: builder module row extended with validateResponse, enrichResponse, promoteGroups, merge (documented in builder.md but missing from index).

after.notes: Five factual fixes shipped. Phrasing variations intentionally not touched per Ingi's intent-based-language reframing. Side discovery: variables.md had 5 broken links not just 1, all repaired. Worth a wider broken-link sweep across Documentation/v0.2/ in a follow-up.
